params.name: Cthaat Aquadingen
params.description:
On Jun 22, 330 BC, someone found a strange book on the beach in Hera.
The Cthaat Aquadingen is the holy book of aquatic life, which includes all the relevant knowledge about the mysterious aquatic creatures lurking in the oceans, lakes, and rivers. The book also records some indescribable and powerful existences, and those ancient races can summon them by relying on this book. Even the name of this book is derived from a powerful ruler of the past. Perhaps influenced by this ruler, when the a …
